title: Form Creation: Basics of Creating Forms with WTForms

content.problemStatement:
In the previous topic, we saw how to work with HTML Forms using Flask. \
Here - Python / Flask was used to handle changes at the back-end / server side .

We can also create forms in Flask using WTForms, a powerful library that simplifies form handling. \
WTForms are useful because it helps us
- Create and manage forms in Python classes instead of writing HTML manually.
- Automatically handle form validation (e.g., required fields, email formats, value ranges).
- Make it easier to show form errors and retain user inputs.

### NOTE:
To install WTForms use `pip install flask-wtf`.

Let us learn some of these concepts in this topic.
